texto: In political affairs illusions are usually the product of a failure to appreciate change; but such failure-usually a necessary and perhaps salutary part of human affairs-becomes, when the change is very fast, not a stabilizing conservatism but a form of deception resembling lunacy.
explicacao: Citação de Laurence Lafore sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “In political affairs illusions are usually the product of a failure to appreciate change; but suc…” articula reflexao, history, world-war-ii em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como mudanca e world-war-ii.
